screens.title: Welcome Home
screens.description: Landing page with couple names, countdown timer, couple message, upcoming event teaser, gallery preview, and stay info links.

screens.title: Mehndi Day Details
screens.description: Mehndi event detail page with date, venue, dress code, what-to-expect sections, and RSVP call-to-action.

screens.title: Cocktail Party Details
screens.description: Cocktail evening event details with venue, dress code, and RSVP prompt.

screens.title: Haldi Detail
screens.description: Haldi ceremony page with ritual description, timing, dress code, and attendance confirmation.

screens.title: The Celebrations
screens.description: Full 4-day celebration itinerary listing Haldi, Cocktail Party, Mehndi, and Wedding Day with event detail links.

screens.title: Guest Login
screens.description: Guest login screen with name, invite code, and mobile number fields.

screens.title: Guest Gallery & Uploads
screens.description: Community photo gallery with event filter tabs, upload button, and moderation status badges.

screens.title: RSVP Form
screens.description: RSVP form covering all 4 events with attending/not-attending toggles, guest count selectors, notes field, and deadline.

screens.title: Wedding Day Details
screens.description: Main wedding day detail screen with venue, full ceremony itinerary (Baraat, Varmala, Pheras, Dinner), and RSVP CTA.

screens.title: Stay Info
screens.description: Hotel stay information with room assignment, check-in/out times, and upcoming venue events.
